rationale: Proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to grand jury ballot examination procedures under Election Code §273.042.
quote: On request of a grand jury for an examination of voted ballots, a district judge may order the custodian of the ballots and the custodian of the keys to the ballot boxes to deliver the ballot boxes and the keys to the grand jury.
_note: No overlap between property tax homestead exemption and election ballot examination statute.
